data.title: Mineros S.A. begins trading on OTCQX market under symbol "MNSAF", offering US investors real-time financial info.
data.description: Mineros S.A., a prominent Latin American gold producer, has gained qualification to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. With the ticker symbol “MNSAF,” the company commenced trading on the OTCQX today, targeting U.S. investors. As per David Splett, the Chief Financial Officer, the move to OTCQX is significant. Investors can access real-time Level 2 quotes and current financial disclosures for Mineros S.A. on www.otcmarkets.com. The company's stock is listed under the symbols TSX:MSA, OTCQX:MNSAF, MINEROS:CB.

data.title: Metropolitan Commercial Bank wins 2025 WebAward for Bank Standard of Excellence, recognized by Web Marketing Association.
data.description: Metropolitan Commercial Bank, based in New York City, has recently been honored with the 2025 WebAward for Bank Standard of Excellence from the Web Marketing Association. This recognition signifies the Bank's dedication to providing a top-tier digital experience that showcases innovation and prioritizes client satisfaction. The "Bank Standard of Excellence Award" is a prestigious accolade that underscores the Bank's commitment to delivering outstanding online services.

EU council: ‘Russia’s hybrid threats: prolongs against those responsible for Russia’s destabilising actions abroad. The EU and its MS will continue to draw on the full range of tools available to protect, prevent & respond to such malicious behaviour.’

data.title: Ovid Therapeutics priced private placement for $175 million, with $81 million initial funding for operations and potential $94 million more from warrants.
data.description: An initial closure of around $81 million is anticipated to support the current operating plan and clinical pipeline until 2028. There is the possibility of receiving up to $94 million in extra proceeds if the issued warrants are exercised.

data.title: Cartesian Therapeutics grants 9,700 shares at $10.34 to new employee, with vesting over 4 years, fully vested by 2029.
data.description: In Frederick, Maryland, on October 3, 2025, Cartesian Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: RNAC) disclosed an award granted to a new employee. This award entails the right to purchase 9,700 shares of the Company's common stock at $10.34 per share, which was the closing trading price on the Nasdaq Global Market on the grant date of October 2, 2025. The option, approved by the board of directors under the Company’s Amended and Restated 2018 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan, will vest in increments: 25% on October 2, 2026, and the remaining portion in three equal annual segments, culminating in full vesting by October 2, 2029. The option, valid for ten years, was granted in compliance with Rule 5635(c)(4) of the Nasdaq Listing Rules, signifying its importance as an inducement for the new employee to join the Company.

data.title: Dutch Bros Foundation donated $1.2M to support youth initiatives by contributing $1 for every drink sold at participating locations.
data.description: On Friday, September 19, the Dutch Bros Foundation pledged to contribute $1 for each beverage purchased at selected Dutch Bros outlets to support youth groups in the community. The event, known as Buck For Kids day, took place in TEMPE, Arizona on October 3, 2025. This initiative by Dutch Bros and its customers aimed to assist local youth organizations by donating a dollar for every drink sold on that day.

data.title: Silver Storm has released its initial Fall Conference Schedule and hired Renmark Financial Communications.
data.description: Toronto-based Silver Storm recently disclosed their initial conference plans for the upcoming fall season. The company has arranged various engagements as part of their conference schedule and has also enlisted the services of Renmark Financial Communications. This strategic move is expected to enhance their communication strategies and outreach efforts in the market.

data.title: Bruker receives orders for NMR systems from New York Structural Biology Center, Univ of Delaware, and Northwestern Univ, funded by NIH and NSF.
data.description: Bruker Corporation revealed the procurement of cutting-edge Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) instrumentation by key institutions. The New York Structural Biology Center (NYSBC), University of Delaware, and Northwestern University have placed orders for advanced systems. These acquisitions, backed by the National Institutes of Health (NIH) and the National Science Foundation (NSF), will empower prominent research groups to advance their studies. The instruments will aid in various scientific endeavors, revolutionizing research at these esteemed universities.

data.title: Wall Street analysts project McCormick (NYSE: MKC) will report Q3 earnings of 82 cents per share and revenue of $1.71 billion, up from $1.68 billion last year. McCormick also plans to acquire a 25% stake in McCormick De Mexico for $750 million, raising ownership to 75%. Stock rose 0.5% to $68.09.
data.description: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE: MKC) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, Oct. 7. Analysts predict earnings of 82 cents per share, a decrease from 83 cents per share a year ago. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $1.71 billion, up from $1.68 billion in the same period last year. McCormick recently revealed plans to purchase an additional 25% stake in McCormick De Mexico for $750 million, increasing its ownership to 75%. Following this news, McCormick's stock rose by 0.5% to close at $68.09 on Thursday. For more details, including analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Ovid reports positive results for OV329, a GABA-AT inhibitor, in Phase 1 study, showing strong inhibitory activity and potential safety profile.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Ovid Therapeutics Inc. disclosed encouraging top-line findings from a Phase 1 trial involving healthy volunteers. The study assessed OV329, a novel GABA-aminotransferase (GABA-AT) inhibitor designed to address drug-resistant epilepsies. The results highlighted positive outcomes in terms of safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetic (PK), and pharmacodynamic (PD) activity. Ovid Therapeutics Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company (Nasdaq: OVID) concentrated on creating small molecule drugs to treat brain disorders with substantial unmet needs.

data.title: ezPaycheck offers affordable centralized payroll software for businesses, HR, and accountants with the special offer for 2025.
data.description: Save money on your payroll operations with the ezPaycheck 2025 Special Offer. This payroll software is user-friendly and designed for businesses, HR, and Accountants. Based in REDMOND, Wash., it enables you to manage payroll internally and perform calculations easily. Enjoy the benefits of this offer beginning October 3, 2025.

data.title: Foxconn's Max Chu ranked No. 2 on the list of Top 30 Supply Chain Leaders of 2025, emphasizing shared success.
data.description: Max Chu has recently earned the second position in the "Top 30 Supply Chain Leaders of 2025" for his leadership style emphasizing shared success. This recognition was announced by Hon Hai Technology Group ("Foxconn") (TWSE:2317) based in Taipei on October 3, 2025. Max Chu serves as the Chief Procurement Officer. The award highlights his significant contributions to supply chain management and underscores his approach focused on mutual achievements.

data.title: Alsco Uniforms donates $50,000 to Father Joe's Villages in San Diego to aid homeless services.
data.description: In support of its mission to prevent and eradicate homelessness while offering aid to those in need, a 75-year-old organization received a generous donation. On October 3, 2025, in Salt Lake City, Alsco Uniforms contributed toward this cause. Alsco Uniforms specializes in providing uniforms, linens, and facility services to various businesses across different locations.

data.title: Supabase secures $100M with $5B valuation, led by Accel and Peak XV, to support data-intensive enterprises.
data.description: A leading backend provider for AI-centric development has secured substantial funding to cater to the needs of high-data enterprises. In an announcement in San Francisco on October 3, 2025, Supabase, known for its Postgres platform, successfully completed a Series E funding round amassing $100 million. This funding has propelled the company's valuation to an impressive $5 billion. The financing was spearheaded by...

data.title: Brookfield Renewable to discuss Q3 2025 results in conference call on Nov 5, 9:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: In Brookfield, recent updates state that Brookfield Renewable (NYSE: BEP, BEPC; TSX: BEP.UN, BEPC) is scheduled to host its Third Quarter 2025 Conference Call and Webcast on Wednesday, November 5, 2025, beginning at 9:00 a.m. ET. This event aims to delve into the outcomes and strategic moves of the company during this period.

data.title: Caring Senior Service expands to Medina, Ohio, aiming to provide quality care to more seniors; second Ohio office opened.
data.description: The owners of Caring Senior Service in Canton have launched a new office in Medina, Ohio, on October 3, 2025. The company offers personalized non-medical care services for seniors. This expansion aims to extend their mission of quality care to more seniors.
